title: Attovia Therapeutics Files for US IPO to Advance Pipeline of Immune Disease Therapies

contentHtml:
Bengaluru: Biopharmaceutical ‚Äčcompany Attovia Therapeutics on ‚ÄčTuesday filed for an initial ‚Äčpublic offering in the United States, seeking to raise funds to advance the development of its pipeline.

Biotech IPO ‚ÄĆactivity has ‚Ā†been ‚Ā†picking up amid improving investor risk appetite, with ‚Äčsleep-apnea drug developer Apnimed filing for an IPO on Friday ‚Äčand heart-disease drug developer Kardigan raising $400 million in an upsized IPO in June.

Attovia said ‚Äčit plans to use ‚Ā†the IPO ‚ÄĆproceeds, along with existing cash, ‚Äčto advance ‚Äčthe development of its lead ‚Ā†drug candidates, fund research and development activities ‚Äčand for working capital and general corporate ‚Äčpurposes.

Founded in 2023, the company develops biologic therapies for immune-mediated diseases using its ATTOBODY platform, with drug candidates targeting inflammatory skin conditions and inflammatory bowel disease.

Attovia is ‚ÄĆbacked by Goldman Sachs Alternatives, Deep Track Capital, Frazier Life Sciences and ‚ÄčvenBio, each ‚Äčof which ‚Ā†owns at least a 5% stake, according to its filing. The company plans to list on the ‚ÄčNasdaq Global Market under the symbol "ATTO."

Morgan Stanley, Leerink Partners, Citigroup and RBC Capital Markets are among the underwriters for the offering.

Source : Reuters
